geopolitics.title: Iran, US Eke Out Truce
geopolitics.description: The U.S. and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire in exchange for Tehran reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

geopolitics.description: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

geopolitics.title: How did risks of the Iran war get misread? Kahneman and Tversky’s Prospect Theory may have answers
geopolitics.description: The behaviour of warring states may seem baffling, but it seems in line with a behavioural model of risk attitudes. Prospect Theory explains why people go for safe gains or take daring gambles—depending on probability and payoff assessments.
